key.name: ha-url
key.description: Base URL of the Home Assistant instance, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123

key.name: ha-token
key.description: Long-lived access token for authenticating with Home Assistant

key.name: ha-verify-ssl
key.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the Home Assistant instance

key.name: color-entity
key.description: Home Assistant entity to control with the color picker

key.name: color-service
key.description: Service to call for color changes, e.g. light.turn_on

key.name: color-attribute
key.description: Service data attribute for color, e.g. rgb_color

key.name: slider-entity
key.description: Home Assistant entity to control with the slider

key.name: slider-service
key.description: Service to call on slider change, e.g. light.turn_on

key.name: slider-attribute
key.description: Service data attribute for the slider value, e.g. brightness

key.name: slider-min
key.description: Minimum value sent to Home Assistant

key.name: slider-max
key.description: Maximum value sent to Home Assistant

key.name: button-count
key.description: How many action buttons to show in the panel menu

key.name: buttons-config
key.description: JSON array with button configurations (label, icon, entity_id, domain, service, service_data)

key.name: auto-yaml-backup
key.description: Automatically sync settings to a YAML file on every change

key.name: yaml-backup-path
key.description: Path where the YAML backup file is written
